title: MATRIYA Decision Workspace
description: STABLE v1.0. A Decision Workspace is NOT an engine. It assembles the emissions of an Engine Graph (observations, evidence, explanations, predictions, candidates, recommendations, trade-offs, risks, confidence, missing evidence) for one Scientific Task into a single decision SURFACE that a human reasons over. It emits NO decision. The Human Decision happens OUTSIDE the Engine Platform; only the RESULT of that decision re-enters the system as a Knowledge Event (closing the learning loop). This is the architectural home of the v1.1 Decision Boundary. Documentation only; no runtime behaviour.

task.description: The Scientific Task this workspace serves.

isEngine.description: A workspace is never an engine.

producesDecision.description: The workspace never emits a decision — it assembles the surface a human decides on.

humanDecisionExternal.description: The decision is a human act, outside the Engine Platform.

surface.description: The assembled decision surface — engine emissions only, never a decision. Everything a human needs to decide, and nothing that decides for them.

missingEvidence.description: What is not yet known — feeds Knowledge Gap / Experiment Planner.

whatIf.description: Scenario projections (still engine predictions, never decisions).

contributingEmissions.description: Provenance/transparency of the surface: which capability (and, for transparency, which engine) produced each emission. Emission kinds come from the Engine Contract v1.1 `emits` vocabulary — 'decision' is not among them.

capability.description: The Capability Ontology id that produced it.

engine.description: For transparency: the engine that provided the capability.

humanDecision.description: Recorded AFTER a human decides, OUTSIDE the platform. Until then, status is 'pending'. The decision itself is not computed here; only its record and its link to the resulting Knowledge Event.

decidedBy.description: The human (role/id) who decided — never an engine.

choice.description: What the human chose (references an alternative).

resultingKnowledgeEvent.description: The Knowledge Event id generated by acting on the decision — the loop back into the system.

allOf.$comment: v1.1 Decision Boundary — a workspace never decides. These three consts are the structural guarantee.
A recorded human decision must be attributed to a human and should link the Knowledge Event that carries its result back into the learning loop.
